issues.title: Typo in documentation - section EmbeddingClient#Available Implementations
issues.body: I think there's a typo in this section: https://docs.spring.io/spring-ai/reference/api/embeddings.html#_available_implementations, the first bullet point is: "OpenAI: Using the **Sprig** AI OpenAiApi library" but maybe it should be:  "OpenAI: Using the **Spring** AI OpenAiApi library"
